SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT WALKER, LASHON
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION NOV-22-2002, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JAN-10-2003 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 CONTINUANCE IS FOR PLAINTIFF TO SERVE ARTURO ALVAREZ AND TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HAMEED, SALEEM RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WALKER, LASHON LEE, BOB MR. ALVAREZ, ARTURO $1,145.50 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,195.50, BOB LEE IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. OF THE TOTAL JUDGMENT AGAINST DEFENDANTS WALKER AND ALVAREZ, THEY ARE JOINTLY RESPONSIBLE FOR $1040.00 PLUS 1/2/ OF THE COSTS EACH. WALKER IS SOLELY RESPONSIBLE FOR THE ADDITIONAL $105.50. PROOF OF SERVICE WAIVED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF MAR-14-2003, DENIED
